summary: Tested per-employee affordability breakdown in compliance check popup. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend UI correctly displays: summary cards (Employee Cost, ACA Threshold, Pass Rate), green/red legend (Affordable/Unaffordable counts), Employee Breakdown table with columns (Employee, Salary, Max Affordable, Plan Cost, % of Income, Status), filter tabs (All, Can Afford, Cannot), and 'Show all X employees' toggle. Silver PPO shows 100% pass rate (47/47 affordable at $100/mo). Platinum PPO shows 42.6% pass rate (20 affordable, 27 unaffordable at $744/mo). Employees correctly sorted: unaffordable first, then by pct_of_income descending. At-risk employees logic correctly returns 0 when employer has compliant MEC+MV plans available.
passed_tests: Backend: Each employee entry has required fields (employee_id, name, annual_salary, monthly_threshold, employee_monthly_cost, pct_of_income, affordable)
Backend: Silver PPO ($100/mo) returns 100% pass rate - all 47 employees affordable
Backend: Platinum PPO ($744/mo) returns 42.6% pass rate - 20 affordable, 27 unaffordable
Backend: Employees sorted correctly - unaffordable first, then by pct_of_income descending
Backend: affordable flag matches threshold comparison (ee_cost <= monthly_threshold)
Backend: At-risk employees returns 0 when employer has compliant MEC+MV plans
Frontend: Affordability section shows summary cards (Employee Cost, ACA Threshold, Pass Rate)
Frontend: Green/red legend shows affordable/unaffordable counts
Frontend: Employee Breakdown table with correct columns (Employee, Salary, Max Affordable, Plan Cost, % of Income, Status)
Frontend: Filter tabs (All, Can Afford, Cannot) work correctly
Frontend: 'Show all X employees' toggle expands/collapses the full list
Frontend: Silver PPO shows Pass badge with 100% pass rate
Frontend: Platinum PPO shows Fail badge with 42.6% pass rate
Frontend: Unaffordable employees shown with red X status icon
Frontend: Affordable employees shown with green checkmark status icon
critical_code_review_comments: Backend affordability calculation in enrollment_workflow.py lines 504-531 correctly implements W-2 Safe Harbor method
Employee sorting logic (line 531) correctly sorts unaffordable first, then by pct_of_income descending
Frontend AffordabilityEmployeeList component (lines 974-1049) correctly implements filter tabs and expandable table
At-risk employee logic in server.py lines 1694-1698 correctly checks for compliant plans before marking employees at-risk

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all affordability breakdown UI features working correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing plans: Silver PPO (ac820c3c-4409-4818-82c5-55c8ba523ce9, $100/mo EE cost), Platinum PPO (16739425-5a63-45d9-9fde-418724747016, $744/mo EE cost)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-employee affordability breakdown feature fully tested and working. Key test data: Silver PPO ($100/mo EE cost) has 100% pass rate (47/47 affordable). Platinum PPO ($744/mo EE cost) has 42.6% pass rate (20 affordable, 27 unaffordable). The compliance check endpoint POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns affordability.employees array with: employee_id, name, annual_salary, monthly_threshold, employee_monthly_cost, pct_of_income, affordable. Employees are sorted: unaffordable first, then by pct_of_income descending. Frontend AffordabilityEmployeeList component displays filter tabs (All, Can Afford, Cannot) and expandable table with 'Show all X employees' toggle. At-risk employees logic correctly returns 0 when employer has compliant MEC+MV plans available.

verified_feature_details.feature_description: Per-employee affordability breakdown in compliance check popup

backend_changes.description: Added employee_affordability array with per-employee data (name, annual_salary, monthly_threshold, employee_monthly_cost, pct_of_income, affordable). Sorted unaffordable first, then by pct_of_income descending.

frontend_changes.description: Added AffordabilityEmployeeList component with filter tabs (All, Can Afford, Cannot), expandable table, and summary cards

at_risk_fix.description: Fixed at-risk employee logic to check MEC+MV plan availability instead of enrollment status

Employee Breakdown table (Employee, Salary, Max Affordable, Plan Cost, % of Income, Status)
